title: Carom shot
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''carom shot''' was a tactic by which a warship would ram a second ship, using its momentum to ricochet it into a third ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2000-04-04 -->[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']]
